heading: Public access to mortgage information
label: 4543 Public access to mortgage information
notes: References in TextThe Home Mortgage Disclosure Act of 1975, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), is title III of , , , which is classified principally to chapter 29 (§ 2801 et seq.) of this title. children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Director shall make available to the public, in forms useful to the public (including forms accessible by computers), the data submitted by the enterprises in the reports required under or .section 1723a(m) of this titlesection 1456(e) of this title

children.heading: Census tract level reporting
children.label: 2 Census tract level reporting
children.text: Such data shall include the data elements required to be reported under the Home Mortgage Disclosure Act of 1975 [ et seq.], at the census tract level.12 U.S.C. 2801

children.heading: Proprietary data
children.label: 1 Proprietary data
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Director may not make available to the public data that the Director determines pursuant to are proprietary information.section 4546 of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: The Director shall not restrict access to the data provided in accordance with or or with subsection (a)(2).section 1723a(m)(1)(A) of this titlesection 1456(e)(1)(A) of this title

children.heading: Fees
children.label: c Fees
children.text: The Director may charge reasonable fees to cover the cost of making data available under this section to the public.

children.heading: Timing
children.label: d Timing
children.text: Data submitted under this section by an enterprise in connection with a provision referred to in subsection (a) shall be made publicly available in accordance with this section not later than September 30 of the year following the year to which the data relates.
